.

so... hi.

I wasn't going to upload anything Halloween related, which is crazy because I LOVE halloween sm, but I really didn't have any ideas for it.

but then Janitor launched an event and now I've forced myself to write a bot. yeah yeah, it's a cliché vampire thing. I don't ☺️ fucking care ☺️

i do have ideas for other bots yet Im unmotivated lately to write, to breathe, to live damn and every time i log in here I think "what's the point?" but then again, this place helps me to relax from my chaotic normal life so... here i am. once again.

So, there are high chances that tomorrow I upload a [anypov]Yosano bot following my mansplaining series (trust me in this one 🤞).

have a few other ideas I want to write but I just have to force myself to do them!!! (i love torture myself even when im at my lowest 😚)

★ thank you thank you for the people who sent questions to my Zaqa I LOVED them 😭

aaaand it's really late here in my country, so goodnight everyone.

sweet dreams (if you see this you get a goodnight kiss)
